caption: A cheerful pop song with acoustic guitar, piano, bass, and drums in C major, medium tempo, and a bright uplifting mood.
A sad classical piece with violin, cello, and piano in A minor, slow tempo, and a melancholic mood.
A dark cinematic piece with contrabass, cello, and percussion in A minor, moderate tempo, with a tense dramatic atmosphere.
A calm ambient track with soft piano and airy synth pads, sparse texture, low density, and a peaceful relaxing mood.
An energetic rock track with electric guitar, bass, and drums, fast tempo, driving rhythm, and a lively powerful mood.
A warm jazz piece with piano, upright bass, brushed drums, and saxophone, medium tempo, and a smooth intimate feel.
A gentle folk tune with acoustic guitar, violin, and light percussion, moderate tempo, and a tender calm mood.
A dense electronic dance track with synth bass, bright leads, punchy drums, high energy, and a fast driving groove.
An epic orchestral cinematic cue with strings, brass, percussion, and low basses, dramatic mood, and rich layered texture.
A sparse solo piano piece in a calm reflective mood, low density, long notes, and a gentle slow tempo.
A bright high-register chamber melody with flute, violin, and light piano accompaniment, cheerful and airy.
A low-register dark ensemble with bass, cello, and deep percussion, slow heavy movement, and an ominous mood.
